summary: Twelve screen-first image-ad routes for apps, SaaS tools, AI products, developer products, collaboration tools, marketplaces, commerce products, and other software products where the UI is the product proof.
whenToUse: Use when the product is a digital interface and the ad needs to keep the app screen large, inspectable, product-specific, and central to the composition.
requiredInputs: approved UI reference or conceptual UI caveat
exact exterior headline and CTA, or NONE
riskGates: real customer names or private data
exterior copy that was not supplied
